strengths: ~19 years of hands-on software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems (e.g., low-latency micro-services handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform deployed on Kubernetes and used by Green Map
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
concerns: No evidence of director/principal-level scope: career history is senior/staff IC delivery work, with no strategic advisory, org-wide technical leadership, or executive partnership
AI depth is thin and very recent (2025-present tooling contributions); no demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms, and no Master's/PhD in an AI-related field
Public speaking and workshops center on testing, web internals, and GIS — no recognized thought leadership in AI or cloud strategy as the role requires

key_factors.factor: Gap to director-level AI strategy scope
Meets minimum bar (BS + 15+ years engineering, founder experience)

response.justification: The role demands a director-level IC with recognized AI expertise who advises strategic customers and shapes cloud/AI product strategy. The candidate clears the minimum qualifications — a BS in Computer Science and roughly 19 years of engineering experience — and shows entrepreneurial initiative (founding GISCollective) plus cloud fluency (AWS CDK, Kubernetes). However, the preferred and role-defining competencies are largely absent: his AI experience is limited to recent MCP/agentic tooling work started in 2025, the résumé shows no AI-powered products or platforms of note, no advanced AI degree, and his public talks (FOSS4G, testing workshops) demonstrate community teaching rather than recognized AI thought leadership. There is also no evidence of operating at the strategic, cross-organizational level the position requires. He is a strong senior/staff engineer, but the evidence does not support fit for this specific principal AI-strategy role.
